author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. Fused Adam PTX kernel (fused_adam_kernel) — single kernel launch updates param, exp_avg, exp_avg_sq in-place. Handles L2 weight decay, bias correction, and the full Adam update in one pass.
2. GpuBackend::fused_adam_f32() trait method + CudaBackendImpl wiring
3. Adam optimizer now stores GPU state (gpu_exp_avg, gpu_exp_avg_sq as GpuBufferHandles) for CUDA f32 params
4. GPU fast-path in Adam::step() — no CPU round-trips for f32 GPU params (non-AMSGrad, non-maximize)
5. CPU f64 path preserved for CPU params, f64, AMSGrad, and maximize cases
6. state_dict() downloads GPU moments to CPU f64 for serialization
7. Added TensorStorage::gpu_handle_mut(), Tensor::inner_storage_arc(), Tensor::update_storage()
8. 250 optim + 837 core tests pass including Rosenbrock convergence, AMSGrad, weight decay, state_dict roundtrip
